headline: Diamondback Energy’s (FANG) Viper Energy Completes Acquisition of Riverbend Oil & Gas IX Assets
summary: Diamondback Energy Inc. (NASDAQ:FANG) is one of the 10 Most Undervalued NASDAQ Stocks to Buy Right Now. On July 1, Viper Energy, a subsidiary of Diamondback Energy, announced the completion of its acquisition of Riverbend Oil & Gas IX, LLC. The transaction involved the transfer of mineral and royalty interests to Viper in exchange for […]
